{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
from ipywidgets import FileUpload
import pandas as pd
#from tqdm import tqdm
#from fastcore.basics import store_attr
#from pathlib import Path
from marisco.data.core import *
import warnings

warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')
pd.set_option('display.max_rows', 200)
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
btn_upload = FileUpload(
    accept='.csv',  
    multiple=False
)
display(btn_upload)
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
btn_upload.data
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
fname = '/Users/franckalbinet/pro/IAEA/MARIS/data/dump/2021-12-21 allSeawater.csv'
dst = '/Users/franckalbinet/pro/IAEA/MARIS/data/csv'
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
exploder = DumpExploder(fname, dst)
df = exploder.load_data()
#exploder.num_ds()
#exploder.explode()
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
df.shape

(416217, 79)
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
dst = '/Users/franckalbinet/pro/IAEA/MARIS/marisco/nbs/files/exploded/maris-dump-test.csv'
df.sample(50).to_csv(dst, index=False)
{% endraw %}
